creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)

Quoted in comment 0, manu@ (Emmanuel Vadot) wrote: 

"… open a issue on https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod"

– direction to GitHub (not Bugzilla) for bug reports. 


From bug 263720 comment 3: 

> Having an issue on github will help. …


From bug 266745 comment 1: 

> … let me humbly refer you to https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/issues.

… and so on, I'm fairly certain that I have seen comparable steering in other areas. 


The issue template: <https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/blob/master/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md>

> Bug report
> 
> Create a report to help us improve …
